# table_cohort_overlap { #cdmconnector.table_cohort_overlap }

```python
table_cohort_overlap(
    result,
    *,
    unique_combinations=True,
    header=None,
    group_column=None,
    hide=None,
)
```

Format a summarise_cohort_overlap result into a table.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name                | Type                                    | Description   | Default    |
|---------------------|-----------------------------------------|---------------|------------|
| result              | SummarisedResult or DataFrame.          |               | _required_ |
| unique_combinations | If True, show only unique cohort pairs. |               | `True`     |
| header              | Columns for header.                     |               | `None`     |
| group_column        | Extra grouping columns.                 |               | `None`     |
| hide                | Columns to hide.                        |               | `None`     |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type             | Description   |
|--------|------------------|---------------|
|        | pandas.DataFrame |               |
